aesthetic_vibe: Tender, intimate, trust-driven, warm, calm, nurturing, premium. Modern traditional Chinese wellness meeting professional postpartum care. Avoid clinical/cold looks.

typography.anti_default_rule: Strictly NO Inter or Roboto for headings.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-text-primary
hierarchy.label: text-sm tracking-wide uppercase text-text-secondary

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-12, p-16, py-24). Avoid cramming elements. Give breathing room.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Soft curves. rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for cards. rounded-full for decorative image frames.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Diffuse ambient shadows. Use shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(131,154,134,0.08)] rather than harsh gray shadows.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Mode A (Tetris Grid) for marketing sections to create gentle asymmetry. Mode B (Control Room) for Admin Dashboard.

surfaces_and_components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) with a 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/40). Visible on desktop.
surfaces_and_components.marketing_components: Use pure HTML/Tailwind. Avoid default Shadcn cards for the main marketing site; use fluid rounded shapes and Cardless designs.
surfaces_and_components.interactive_components: Shadcn for Booking Form, Select, Datepicker, and Admin Dashboard. Heavily customized to fit the organic color palette.
surfaces_and_components.icons: lucide-react with thin stroke widths to maintain elegance.

bilingual_strategy.implementation: Context-based toggle via React state. Ensure dual-font pairing (English serif + Chinese serif) looks seamless. Navigation should feature a clean EN | 中文 button.
bilingual_strategy.disclaimer: The medical disclaimer MUST be prominently displayed in both languages (NOT medical advice, not IBCLC, not for acute mastitis).

pages_and_sections.name: Hero Section
pages_and_sections.details: Bilingual headline. Primary CTA (Book Home Visit). Hero image overlay max bg-white/30. Tender visual of mother/baby.

pages_and_sections.name: Services Showcase (Bento Grid)
pages_and_sections.details: 5 core services (Gentle Milk-In, Natural Supply, Blocked Duct, Weaning, Post-Lactation Clearing). Prices + Duration. Hover states lift cards slightly.

pages_and_sections.name: Philosophy & 'Why It Matters'
pages_and_sections.details: Educational split-screen. Emphasize traditional meridian point pressure. 4 core benefits (Precise, Painless, No Devices, Circulation).

pages_and_sections.name: Pricing & Packages
pages_and_sections.details: Clean tier display. Single sessions, 3-session packages, 5-package combo (1800 AUD). Emphasize 'In-Home Visit' (Perth).

pages_and_sections.name: Online Booking Form
pages_and_sections.details: Name, Phone/WeChat, Email, Service Select (Shadcn), Date/Time (Shadcn Calendar), Postpartum notes, Address.

pages_and_sections.name: Footer & Contact
pages_and_sections.details: Phone (0451960316), WeChat QR code slot, Email (bloommama66@gmail.com), Perth Service Area map/list. Strong disclaimer text.

pages_and_sections.name: Admin Dashboard
pages_and_sections.details: Secure route. Data-heavy layout (Swiss Archetype). Shadcn Table to view, filter, update (Pending/Confirmed/Completed), delete bookings.

testing_and_accessibility.data_testid: ALL interactive elements, form fields, buttons, and navigation MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='book-now-btn').
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets WCAG AA standards, particularly over images and in form placeholders.

media.instructions: Use these precise image URLs. Do NOT use placeholder domains like via.placeholder.com. Ensure images have alt text.

image_urls.description: Sleeping baby on white textile, evoking peace.
Adult hand holding tiny baby hand.
Balanced stones by the sea, representing traditional wellness.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons use hover:bg-primary_hover hover:text-white. Active elements darken appropriately.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Use Framer Motion for staggered entrance animations on the services bento grid.
